_description: LoC ceilings for files being actively shrunk by the thin-harness refactor. Phase 0 captures current sizes as the STARTING point; subsequent phases tighten the ceilings. CI fails if any file exceeds its current ceiling.
_seed_instructions: To regenerate: WRITE_LOC_BUDGET=1 pnpm vitest run test/refactor-phase0.test.ts

phase_targets._comment: Target LoC after each phase completes. Not enforced; documentation of intent.

_post_merge_note: Merged origin/main 4432d5d (feat(memory): curated memory rollout). Main re-inlined sessionSearch/memoryHealth into tools.ts with new response shapes, added sync-workspace-procedures, extended emitMemoryEvent with memory_hit/memory_miss, and improved memoryRecall/memorySave/memoryDelete telemetry. The hygiene-PR extraction to memory-tools.ts was dropped as part of the merge resolution to avoid perpetual conflicts with upstream memory work; memory-tools.ts is deleted and memory-tools.test.ts imports sessionSearch/memoryHealth directly from tools.ts (now exported). Fail-closed org_id fixes from the hygiene PR were re-applied to main's re-inlined versions of sessionSearch, memoryHealth, and the new sync-workspace-procedures. Net: tools.ts 7801 → 8080 (+279 lines, legitimate memory feature + 3 fail-closed rewrites). Phase 8/9 still targets further reduction via tool consolidation, not memory-feature rollbacks.
